title: Run clippy and rustfmt, fix all warnings
description: No clippy or rustfmt pass has been done. Run: cargo fmt --all, cargo clippy -- -D warnings. Fix all warnings and formatting issues. Add these to the build/test section of CLAUDE.md as required quality gates.
close_reason: All quick fixes applied: markdown rendering, feed dedup, rate limiter wired in, error logging, shared HTTP client, clippy+rustfmt clean
